title: alnus viridis var. corylifolia
intro: Alnus viridis var. corylifolia, also known as green alder, is a plant that belongs to the alder family and is commonly found in wet environments, particularly in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of green alder include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Green alder can be prepared as a decoction or a tincture for its herbal remedies.
